sections.paragraph:
Original: חותם

Transliteration: chôthâm

Phonetic: kho-thawm'

BDB Definition:

Hotham = "seal"
  1. a man of Asher, son of Heber, of the family of Beriah
  2. father of two of David's mighty warriors

Origin: the same as H2368

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
